mapper.sql: id, user_id, login_type, ip_address, user_agent, device_fingerprint, device_type, os, browser, location, latitude, longitude, login_result, fail_reason, is_geo_abnormal, is_device_abnormal, created_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO login_logs ( user_id, login_type, ip_address, user_agent, device_fingerprint, device_type, os, browser, location, latitude, longitude, login_result, fail_reason, is_geo_abnormal, is_device_abnormal, created_at ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{loginType}, #{ipAddress}, #{userAgent}, #{deviceFingerprint}, #{deviceType}, #{os}, #{browser}, #{location}, #{latitude}, #{longitude}, #{loginResult}, #{failReason}, #{isGeoAbnormal}, #{isDeviceAbnormal}, NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT FROM login_logs WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT FROM login_logs WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND login_result = 'SUCCESS' ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO login_logs ( user_id, login_type, ip_address, user_agent, device_fingerprint, device_type, os, browser, location, latitude, longitude, login_result, fail_reason, is_geo_abnormal, is_device_abnormal, created_at ) VALUES
( #{item.userId}, #{item.loginType}, #{item.ipAddress}, #{item.userAgent}, #{item.deviceFingerprint}, #{item.deviceType}, #{item.os}, #{item.browser}, #{item.location}, #{item.latitude}, #{item.longitude}, #{item.loginResult}, #{item.failReason}, #{item.isGeoAbnormal}, #{item.isDeviceAbnormal}, NOW() )
